programs.title: The Coyote: Yellowstone's Underdog
programs.desc: When wolves returned to Yellowstone, coyotes became underdogs. This is how they survived and adapted.

programs.title: Damned to Extinction
programs.desc: With salmon collapsing, a unique orca population starves. Removing four dams could restore their prey.
